scripts.graph:deps: depcruise src --config .dependency-cruiser.graph.cjs --include-only "^src" --output-type dot --output-to docs/dependency-runtime-graph.dot && dot -Tsvg docs/dependency-runtime-graph.dot -o docs/dependency-runtime-graph.svg && depcruise src --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs --include-only "^src" --output-type dot --output-to docs/dependency-type-graph.full.dot && bun scripts/filter-type-only-dot.mjs docs/dependency-type-graph.full.dot docs/dependency-type-graph.dot && rm docs/dependency-type-graph.full.dot && dot -Tsvg docs/dependency-type-graph.dot -o docs/dependency-type-graph.svg
